mapper.sql: progress_id, user_id, subject_id, node_id, lesson_completed, practice_passed, progress_rate, completed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM learning_progress ORDER BY subject_id ASC, node_id ASC, progress_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_progress (user_id, subject_id, node_id, lesson_completed, practice_passed, progress_rate, completed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{subjectId}, #{nodeId}, #{lessonCompleted}, #{practicePassed}, #{progressRate}, #{completedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_progress SET user_id = #{userId}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, node_id = #{nodeId}, lesson_completed = #{lessonCompleted}, practice_passed = #{practicePassed}, progress_rate = #{progressRate}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE progress_id = #{progressId}
